entity.summary: Bitkub Chain constant-product decentralized exchange layer for Durianfun markets that graduate from bonding curves into dedicated KUB-token AMM pools.
entity.notes: Current open-source volume adapter code documents the Durianfun graduation flow into dedicated Durian AMM pools, discovers newly graduated pools automatically, and pulls swap activity hourly on Bitkub Chain. HEI models the exchange layer as one Durian AMM entity rather than separate pools or launchpad markets.

evidence.title: Durian AMM DEX volume adapter
evidence.notes: Current adapter documents post-graduation constant-product Durian AMM pools on Bitkub Chain, automatic pool discovery, swap events, fees, and hourly metric pulls starting in 2026.

evidence.title: Durianfun protocol adapter
evidence.notes: Protocol adapter corroborates the broader Durianfun on-chain system from which graduated markets migrate into Durian AMM pools.

evidence.title: Durianfun AMM DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus preserves Durianfun AMM as the exchange layer. HEI consolidates graduated pools into one Durian AMM entity.
